mapper.select: SELECT p.ID AS id, p.CODE AS code, p.NAME AS name, p.TYPE AS type, p.TICKET_CODE_TYPE AS ticketCodeType, p.COMMISSION_RATE AS commissionRate, p.BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber, p.ADDRESS AS address, p.MANAGER_NAME AS managerName, p.MANAGER_EMAIL AS managerEmail, p.MANAGER_PHONE AS managerPhone, p.CONTRACT_START_DATE AS contractStartDate, p.CONTRACT_END_DATE AS contractEndDate, p.COUPON_CODE AS couponCode, p.STATUS AS status, p.LOGO_URL AS logoUrl, p.DESCRIPTION AS description FROM PARTNERS p WHERE p.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PARTNERS ( ID, CODE, NAME, TYPE, TICKET_CODE_TYPE, STATUS, BUSINESS_NUMBER, ADDRESS, MANAGER_NAME, MANAGER_EMAIL, MANAGER_PHONE, CONTRACT_START_DATE, CONTRACT_END_DATE, COMMISSION_RATE, DESCRIPTION, COUPON_CODE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{code}, #{name}, #{type}, #{ticketCodeType}, #{status}, #{businessNumber}, #{address}, #{managerName}, #{managerEmail}, #{managerPhone}, #{contractStartDate}, #{contractEndDate}, #{commissionRate}, #{description}, #{couponCode}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE PARTNERS
CODE = #{model.code},
NAME = #{model.name},
TYPE = #{model.type},
TICKET_CODE_TYPE = #{model.ticketCodeType},
STATUS = #{model.status},
BUSINESS_NUMBER = #{model.businessNumber},
ADDRESS = #{model.address},
MANAGER_NAME = #{model.managerName},
MANAGER_EMAIL = #{model.managerEmail},
MANAGER_PHONE = #{model.managerPhone},
CONTRACT_START_DATE = #{model.contractStartDate},
CONTRACT_END_DATE = #{model.contractEndDate},
COMMISSION_RATE = #{model.commissionRate},
DESCRIPTION = #{model.description},
COUPON_CODE = #{model.couponCode},
LOGO_URL = #{model.logoUrl},
UPDATED_AT = NOW()
WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE PARTNERS SET STATUS = 'DELETED', UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE PRODUCTS SET VISIBLE = FALSE, SALES_STATUS = 'STOPPED', UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId}
UPDATE PARTNERS SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE PRODUCTS SET VISIBLE = TRUE, SALES_STATUS = 'READY', UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId}
UPDATE PARTNERS SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
